keep_condition: Keep only mutations that improve benchmark clarity or diagnosis accuracy without adding automatic memory mutation.
keep_rule: Keep only mutations that improve benchmark clarity or diagnosis accuracy without adding automatic memory mutation.
promotion_condition: All targeted Builder tests pass, creator-run-smoke passes, and repair authority remains diagnosis-only.
reject_rule: Reject mutations that purge traces, rewrite active profile facts, or widen Telegram authority without a separate gate.
rollback_condition: Any regression in memory_doctor or gateway memory_doctor tests.
